entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI.
Am I speaking with Maria?
Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient whose appointment you'd like to reschedule.
Hi, this is
Just to confirm, I have your name as James Wilson and your date of birth as March 5th, 1983. Is that correct?
Oh, actually, this is James Wilson calling. I need to reschedule my appointment.
If so, please spell your first and last name for me.
Sure, it’s James Wilson, and my date of birth is March 5th, 1983.
Thanks. Could you please spell your last name, Wilson?
Yes, that’s correct. It’s J-A-M-E-S for the first name, and W-I-L-S-O-N for the last name.
Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please provide the number you have on file with us.
Sure, it’s W-I-L-S-O-N.
If you're not sure, just let me know.
Sure, it's W-I-L-S-O-N.
I have your phone number as 555-239-7812 and your date of birth as March 5th, 1983. Is that correct?
Yeah, sure. The number on file should be 555-239-7812.
I can't help with rescheduling right now, but I'll connect you to our patient support team.
Yes, that’s correct.
Please stay on the line. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Oh, I really need to reschedule that appointment.
Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.
All right, I'm holding.
Goodbye.
Wait, I still need to reschedule my appointment—can you help me with that before you go?
